backend/main.mo: Main Motoko actor implementing the TrustTrack backend with donor CRUD, donation records, grocery items, sub-account management, user profiles, and role-based access control using an authorization mixin.
feature_evidence.json: Feature evidence report mapping two UI reformatting features (Header nav and WelcomeBanner content converted to bullet point lists) to their respective source files and test IDs.
frontend-file-summaries.txt: JSON document summarizing each frontend source file's purpose, covering components, pages, hooks, and utilities in the TrustTrack React application.
frontend/index.css: Global Tailwind CSS entry point defining OKLCH-based CSS custom properties for light and dark theme color tokens including background, foreground, chart, and sidebar variables.
frontend/index.html: HTML entry point for the TrustTrack Vite/React app, setting the page title, favicon, description meta tag, and mounting the React root div.
frontend/src/App.tsx: Root React component that configures TanStack Router with all application routes (donor list, detail, add/edit, admin, profile setup, login), wrapped in ThemeProvider and QueryClientProvider with a shared Layout.
frontend/src/components/CSVImportModal.t: Modal dialog component that handles CSV file selection (drag-and-drop or click), validates and parses donor rows, imports them via the createDonor mutation, and displays a per-row import summary with errors.
frontend/src/components/EmptyState.tsx: Reusable empty state UI component that displays an optional icon, title, description, and an action button for zero-data scenarios.
frontend/src/components/Footer.tsx: App footer component showing the TrustTrack brand name, copyright year, and a caffeine.ai attribution link with UTM parameters.
frontend/src/components/Header.tsx: Renders the app header with navigation links, Internet Identity login/logout, admin panel link visibility based on role, and sub-account session display with logout.
frontend/src/components/ManageGroceryLis: Admin UI component for viewing, adding, and deleting grocery items used in the donation selection list, with loading skeletons and toast notifications.
frontend/src/components/ManageSubAccount: Admin UI for creating and deleting staff sub-accounts with username, SHA-256-hashed password, and role selection, displaying existing accounts in a list.
frontend/src/components/MapPreviewDrawer: A bottom drawer component that embeds a Google Maps iframe for a donor's location and provides a fallback link to open the map externally.
frontend/src/components/RecordDonationMo: Modal dialog for recording a donation (money or groceries) for a specific donor, with form validation and submission via the addDonationRecord mutation.
frontend/src/components/WelcomeBanner.ts: Hero banner for the home page displaying the app name, donor count, feature highlights, and role-based action buttons for adding donors or accessing the admin panel.
frontend/src/hooks/useActor.ts: Creates and caches an ICP backend actor using React Query, returning either an anonymous or authenticated actor based on the current Internet Identity, and invalidates dependent queries when the actor changes.
frontend/src/hooks/useInternetIdentity.t: Provides an InternetIdentityProvider and useInternetIdentity hook for managing ICP Internet Identity authentication state, including login, logout, and identity persistence via AuthClient.
frontend/src/hooks/useQueries.ts: Exports React Query hooks for all backend CRUD operations including donors, donation records, grocery items, sub-accounts, and admin checks, using the useActor hook to access the backend actor.
frontend/src/hooks/useSubAccountAuth.ts: Manages a sub-account session (username and role) persisted in localStorage, exposing login/logout functions and role-based boolean flags.
frontend/src/index.css: Defines global CSS with Tailwind directives, a warm earthy design token palette for light and dark modes, and print-specific styles to hide UI chrome and clean up donor card layouts.
frontend/src/main.tsx: Application entry point that renders the React app wrapped with QueryClientProvider and InternetIdentityProvider.
frontend/src/pages/AdminPanelPage.tsx: Admin panel page that restricts access to admins and sub-admins, providing tabs for managing grocery items and staff accounts, plus CSV import/export functionality.
frontend/src/pages/DonorDetailPage.tsx: Donor detail page that displays full donor information, donation history, and role-gated actions (edit, delete, record donation, map preview) fetched by donor ID from the URL params.
frontend/src/pages/DonorFormPage.tsx: A form page for creating and editing donor records, supporting money or grocery donation types, with role-based access control for admins and sub-admins.
frontend/src/pages/DonorListPage.tsx: Displays a searchable, filterable list of all donors with options to add donors, record donations, export to CSV, and print, with role-based UI controls.
frontend/src/pages/ProfileSetupPage.tsx: A simple onboarding page that prompts a newly authenticated user to enter their name and save their profile before being redirected to the home page.
frontend/src/pages/SubAccountLoginPage.t: A staff login page that authenticates sub-accounts using a username and SHA-256-hashed password, then stores the session role via the sub-account auth hook.
frontend/src/utils/csvExport.ts: Utility that serializes an array of Donor objects into a CSV file (with UTF-8 BOM for Excel compatibility) and triggers a browser download.
frontend/src/utils/csvImport.ts: Utility for parsing and validating CSV files for bulk donor import, checking required headers and field values and returning valid rows alongside per-row errors.
frontend/src/utils/urlParams.ts: Utility functions for reading URL parameters from both query strings and hash-based routing, with helpers to persist, retrieve, and clear those parameters via sessionStorage and history.replaceState.
frontend/tailwind.config.js: Tailwind CSS configuration defining dark mode, custom fonts (Nunito, Lora), OKLCH-based design tokens for colors/borders/shadows, and plugins for animations and typography.
project_state.json: Project state snapshot for TrustTrack, a donor management app, documenting version, feature list, architectural notes (role-based access, sub-accounts, grocery list, CSV import/export), and known issues.
